headline: Musk Escalates OpenAI Legal War, Seeks Altman Ouster and Nonprofit Control
summary: Elon Musk has amended his lawsuit against OpenAI to demand that any damages from the for-profit conversion flow to the nonprofit entity, and that Sam Altman be removed from its board. The move deepens governance uncertainty around OpenAI at a moment when its commercial partnerships and enterprise commitments are under scrutiny. If successful, this could structurally constrain OpenAI's capital-raising freedom and slow its infrastructure expansion plans.
oci_implication: OpenAI governance instability creates an opening for OCI to accelerate sovereign and enterprise AI partnerships with customers wary of concentration risk on a single hyperscaler-aligned model provider; Mahesh's team should monitor whether compliance and data-residency commitments made under current OpenAI leadership remain intact as legal pressure mounts.
